HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

43class SimJob {
44 protected:
45 // --- Model state shared across a job ---
46 std::vector<Domain*> domains;
47 SurfaceMesh* mesh;
48 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2>* lseMatrix;
49 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2>* lseGradientMatrix[3];
50 std::vector<blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1>*> lseVectors;
51 std::vector<blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1>*> solVectors;
52 std::vector<std::string> labels;
53 dcmplx vacuumWavelength;
54 rvec blochVector;
55 std::vector<rvec> latticeVectors;
56 JobParser jobParser;
57 std::vector<IncidentField*> subjobIncidentFields;
58 bool isCasimirJob;
59 static int threads;
60
61 // ---- Parsers used inside LoadFromFile() ----
66 int LoadLabel();
67
72 int LoadMesh();
73
78 int LoadMeshPer();
79
84 int LoadWavelength();
85
90 int LoadDomain();
91
96 int LoadDomainLayered();
97
102 int LoadDomainPer();
103
108 int LoadPlanewave();
109
114 int LoadDipole();
115
120 int LoadGaussian();
121
126 int LoadPeriodicity();
127
128 LookupTableBin* t;
129 bool thereIsALookupTable;
130
131 public:
132 // ---------------- Lifecycle ----------------
134 SimJob();
136 virtual ~SimJob();
137
138 // ---------------- Job I/O ----------------
143 int LoadFromFile();
144
149 int LoadSubjobFromFile();
150
151 // ---------------- Linear system construction ----------------
157 int CreateLSEMatrix();
158
163 int CreateLSEVec();
164
169 int CreateSolVec();
170
171 // ---------------- Solvers ----------------
177 int SolveLSE(int solverType);
178
186 template <class T>
187 int WriteVectorToFile(std::string fileName, blitz::Array<T, 1>* vector);
188
194 int LoadSolFromFile(std::string solFile);
195
196 // ---------------- Orchestration ----------------
204 int Simulate(std::string jobFile, int solverType, std::string outPrefix);
205
206 // ---------------- Point-wise queries ----------------
212 Domain* ContainingDomain(rvec pos);
213
219 std::pair<cvec, cvec> EField(rvec pos);
220
227 std::pair<cvec, cvec> EField(rvec pos, Domain* contDomain);
228
234 std::pair<cvec, cvec> HField(rvec pos);
235
242 std::pair<cvec, cvec> HField(rvec pos, Domain* contDomain);
243
251 std::pair<std::pair<cvec, cvec>, std::pair<cvec, cvec> > EandHField(
252 rvec pos, Domain* contDomain);
253
254 // ---------------- Diagnostics ----------------
261 double Power(Domain* domain);
262
267 std::vector<double> scatteringCS(Domain* domain);
268
274 double absorptionCS(Domain* domain);
275
281 double extinctionCS(Domain* domain);
282
283 // ---------------- Field evaluation over many points ----------------
297 int FieldEval(std::string jobFile, std::string posFile, std::string outPrefix,
298 uint fields, bool needsCS = false);
299
313 void FieldEvalParallel(
314 std::vector<rvec>& posvec, bool needsE, bool needsH,
315 std::vector<std::pair<std::pair<cvec, cvec>, std::pair<cvec, cvec>>>&
316 result,
317 std::vector<Domain*>& contDom, int& nPoint, std::mutex& mut);
318
319 // ---------------- Casimir force computation ----------------
326 int Casimir(std::string jobFile, std::string outPrefix);
327
328 // ---------------- Utilities ----------------
334 int LoadTableFromFile(std::string fileName);
335
340 static void AssignThreads(int t);
341
347 void dumpLSEMatrix(blitz::Array<dcmplx,2>* lseMatrix, const std::string &filename);
348
354 void dumpLSEVector(blitz::Array<dcmplx,1>* lseVector, const std::string &filename);
355};

357#endif
Domain.h
Abstract simulation domain class for SIE scattering.
JobParser.h
Lightweight XML-like tag parser for the solver job file.

Header for the SIEForm class.
Domain
Abstract base class for domains.
